projects.title: Data Compression Platform
projects.description: Developed a high-performance video compression platform using Super-Resolution GANs (SR-GANs) to significantly outperform traditional OpenCV techniques in both visual quality and compression ratio. Integrated into a lightweight Flask-based API, optimized for web and mobile deployment.
projects.tech: Python, SR-GAN, Flask, OpenCV, Computer Vision, ML

projects.title: Games Recommender System
projects.description: Built an interactive game recommendation engine using a Restricted Boltzmann Machine (RBM) for collaborative filtering on user preferences. Designed a responsive frontend with React.js and integrated the backend via Flask APIs for dynamic game suggestions.
projects.tech: Python, Flask, React.js, RBM, Data Mining

projects.title: Agent57
projects.description: Implemented the Agent57 RL algorithm to master Atari-like games using Deep Q Networks, combining episodic memory and exploration strategies. Tuned reward optimization and model stability to improve average episodic scores across various environments.
projects.tech: Python, DQN, Gym, NumPy, RL Algorithms
